subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath attained unto the hearing of this Wronged One. Praised be God that thou hast been enabled to offer praise and glorification unto the Beloved of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات باصغاء مظلوم فائز الحمد لله بذکر و ثنای محبوب عالمیان موید شدی و از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
